description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build MSVC that runs on push to master branch and tags v*.*.*, and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two Windows jobs, one for 64-bit and one for 32-bit, both using the windows-latest environment. Each job checks out the code, sets up a library using a bat script, configures CMake with specific generators and bit types, and then builds the project using CMake.
